currentCustomer.customerNameNote: (as stated under the existing telephone application/agreement)

currentCustomer.transferTo: Kindly transfer the above telephone to following person/Company

newApplicant.remarksNote: (* absence of the Customer, Changes in Billing Address / Packages type etc...)

documents.heading: Required Documents Checklist
documents.both: Both owner and spouse are dead
documents.noteText: In case the above specified documents are unavailable, you may contact the Regional Telecom Manager or the Manager of the nearest SLT Teleshop in your area.

docs.formA_or_consent: Form A in overleaf or letter of consent from present owner
docs.newOwnerNic: Photo copy of NIC of new owner
docs.form20: A copy of the form 20 obtained from the registrar of companies
docs.brCopy: A Copy of the Business Registration with the original
docs.companyRequest: Request letter from the company with two signatures of Directors (Embossed seal required)
docs.companyResolution: Company resolution to settle any outstanding arrears
docs.companyRequestOfficial: Request letter from the company with two signatures of Directors (Embossed seal is required)
docs.authLetter: Authorization letter of the respective organization
docs.consentPresentOwner: Consent letter from the present owner
docs.marriageCert: A copy of the Marriage Certificate with the original
docs.deathCert: A copy of the Death Certificate with the original
docs.birthCert: If above is not available Birth certificate of a legitimate child
docs.spouseRequest: A request letter of the spouse
docs.deathCertOrGs: A copy of the Death Certificate with the original or if the same is not available a letter from the GS certifying the death.
docs.marriageOrBirth: A copy of the Marriage Certificate or if the same is not available, Birth Certificate of a legitimate child.
docs.closestRelationRequest: Request letter of the closest relation (eg.-mother) certified the signature by JP (if unable to come)
docs.birthCertUser: Request letter and a copy of the Birth Certificate with original of the present user
docs.familyConsent: Consent letter from the family members
docs.gsJpCert: Certification of the G.S. or JP about the family members
docs.legalOwnerMissing: Legal owner unable to trace, not in the island or is dead
docs.tempForm: Temporarily Transfer Forms from SLT (Indemnity Bond)
docs.presentUserRequest: Request letter from the present user

declaration.heading: Declarations & Consents
declaration.currConsentText: I hereby authorize the transfer of the telephone connection to the applicant detailed in the previous step. I understand that this action transfers the service and associated facilities.
declaration.currConsentLabel: I, the current customer, consent to this transfer.
declaration.newDeclText: Kindly transfer the above telephone to my/our name. I am willing to take over the telephone service with existing all facilities and service already provided by SLT. I take responsibility of settling the bills with the outstanding balance.
declaration.newDeclLabel: I, the new applicant, accept responsibility and agree to the terms.
declaration.terms1: The changing of the ownership shall be at the sole discretion of SLT and SLT reserves the right to request any further documents if SLT so wishes.
declaration.terms2: The applicant shall be responsible to resolve any dispute which may arise between Customer and the Applicant and arise regarding the eligibility of the customer to transfer the telephone service in Applicants name and shall indemnify and keep SLT indemnified over any such disputes.
declaration.terms3: In the event of applicant's request being cancelled at any subsequent stage he shall with immediate effect settle all outstanding dues and shall at all times be liable to settle such outstanding dues.
